problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Resonant. Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
